creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

I just checked checked your website.  And unfortunately the information 
there does not match the information you provided in your request.

While the website claims "we are a team of web designers" the request 
says "we are provided FreeBSD consulting/hosting solutions".

FreeBSD (or any other operating system) is not mentioned on the website. 
  Neither is that your doing any consulting/hosting at all.

This means that at the current we are not able to add you to our 
consultant list.  At least until we have some more information/proof 
regarding your FreeBSD activities.

Otherwise we will have to close this report.

Regards


jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
